description: Initial deployment. mistral:7b-instruct via Ollama. chunk_size=256. ChromaDB mlops_rag with 10 documents. all-MiniLM-L6-v2 embeddings. Three tools: Retriever, Summarizer, KeywordExtractor.

Prometheus + Grafana monitoring stack deployed. 7 metric panels: RAG QPS, Total Requests, P99 Latency, Generation P50, Retrieval Similarity, Ollama Status, Input Anomaly. Real Mistral inference instrumented.

A/B test started: chunk_size=256 (A) vs chunk_size=512 (B). 130 simulated queries per variant. Primary metric: groundedness score. Power calculation: 123 samples required at alpha=0.05, power=0.80, MDE=0.05.

A/B test concluded. Variant B (chunk_size=512) won: groundedness +0.052 (p=0.0006, significant at Bonferroni-adjusted alpha=0.025). Latency increase +0.14s not significant (p=0.19). Decision: ship Variant B.
Updated chunk_size from 256 to 512 tokens based on A/B test results. Re-indexed ChromaDB mlops_rag collection. Model card updated to reflect new configuration.

Drift analysis completed over 4 simulated weeks. query_length PSI=0.45 at week 4 (critical, above 0.25 threshold). retrieval_similarity degraded from 0.891 to 0.68. Intervention recommended: add confidence threshold and expand corpus.

Full AI risk assessment completed. 10 risks identified across robustness, privacy, bias, compliance categories. Top priorities: R03 corpus scope hallucination, R04 Ollama crash, R06 prompt injection. CTO memo written with 3 pre-launch blockers identified.
